title: Aether's Winterpack
description: A fairly minimal Minecraft modpack for those of you with a festive spirit.
body:
**Winterpack: A fairly minimal Minecraft modpack for those of you with a festive spirit.**

This modpack includes a few mods that should make your game pretty chill, but also a little challenging. You won't experience everything straight away, and it can actually be rather stressful early-game, but rest assured that when you start progressing, you'll have a wonderfully festive time. Apart from being in a world of entirely snowy biomes, there aren't very many large mods and the pack is quite faithful to the vanilla game.

This modpack is inspired by [Forge Labs](https://www.youtube.com/@ForgeLabs), [AsianHalfSquat](https://www.youtube.com/@AsianHalfSquat), and of course, Christmas.



<details>
<summary>SPOILERS FOR THOSE WHO WANT TO GO INTO THIS EXPERIENCE BLIND:</summary>

Includes Another Furniture, EnvironmentZ, Rare Ice, Snow! Real Magic!, Snowy Spirit, YUNG's Better Structures, a few performance & QoL mods, and Essential.

</details>
